title: Generative AI & Modern LLM Applications
html:
Generative AI & Modern LLM Applications

Complete guide to building modern AI applications using Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, vector databases, and RAG systems.

Table of Contents

  • Introduction
  • Prompt Engineering
  • Vector Databases
  • RAG Systems
  • LLM Agents
  • Multi-Agent Systems
  • Production Deployment
  • Resources

Introduction

Why This Module?

The AI industry has rapidly shifted from training models from scratch to using pre-trained foundational models (LLMs). This module teaches you how to:

  • Use LLMs effectively through prompt engineering
  • Build RAG systems for knowledge-augmented AI
  • Create AI agents that can reason and use tools
  • Deploy production GenAI apps that solve real problems

What You'll Build

By the end of this module, you'll be able to:

  • Build RAG systems for document Q&A
  • Create autonomous AI agents
  • Deploy GenAI applications to production
  • Optimize LLM applications for cost and performance

Prompt Engineering

For comprehensive prompt engineering coverage, see:

  • Generative AI Comprehensive Guide - Prompt Engineering Section

Key Topics:

  • Zero-shot and few-shot prompting
  • Chain-of-thought reasoning
  • Handling hallucinations
  • Text embeddings
  • Advanced techniques

Vector Databases

For detailed vector database coverage, see:

  • Generative AI Comprehensive Guide - Vector Databases Section

Key Topics:

  • Pinecone, ChromaDB, Weaviate, FAISS
  • Semantic search
  • Similarity matching
  • Embedding storage and retrieval

RAG Systems

For comprehensive RAG implementation, see:

  • RAG Comprehensive Guide

Key Topics:

  • RAG architecture
  • Document processing
  • Embedding generation
  • Vector database integration
  • Evaluation metrics

LLM Agents

For detailed agent development, see:

  • AI Agents Guide

Key Topics:

  • LangChain agents
  • LangGraph workflows
  • Tool integration
  • Memory management
  • Agent evaluation

Multi-Agent Systems

For multi-agent system development, see:

  • AI Agents Guide - Multi-Agent Systems

Key Topics:

  • Agent coordination
  • CrewAI and AutoGen
  • MCP (Model Context Protocol)
  • Specialized agent roles

Production Deployment

For production deployment patterns, see:

  • GenAI Production Deployment Guide

Key Topics:

  • Deployment strategies
  • Cost optimization
  • Monitoring and observability
  • Security best practices

Resources

Comprehensive Guides

  • Generative AI Comprehensive Guide: Complete overview
  • RAG Comprehensive Guide: RAG implementation
  • LangChain Guide: LangChain framework
  • AI Agents Guide: AI agents
  • GenAI Production Deployment Guide: Production patterns

Quick Start

  1. Start with Prompt Engineering
  2. Learn Vector Databases
  3. Build a RAG System
  4. Create LLM Agents
  5. Deploy to Production

Next: Complete the Advanced Project "LLM Chatbot & RAG System" to apply these concepts.
